title: China-to-India Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.target_requirement: Portable sealed secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes are listed under BIS Scheme II CRS with IS 16046. Battery packs or cells supplied with cordless power tools may therefore need separate BIS CRS registration when they fall within the notified portable application scope. For lithium registrations under IS 16046 (Part 2), the MeitY order dated 3 Feb 2026 requires rated-capacity verification as per IS 16047 (Part 3):2018.
target_standards: IS 16046 (Part 2) for lithium systems where applicable
MeitY order dated 3 Feb 2026 for lithium battery capacity verification
rows.china_equivalent: China evidence may include GB 3883 tool safety plus Chinese battery test reports for cells or packs. These do not replace BIS CRS registration for India when the portable sealed secondary cell or battery is in scope.
rows.gap: Cordless-tool dossiers often treat the tool and battery as one file. India may require separate CRS registration for the battery or cell, plus separate treatment for the charger or adaptor, even if the tool body itself is evaluated under another BIS route. Lithium files should also show rated-capacity verification to IS 16047 (Part 3):2018 for IS 16046 (Part 2) registrations.

target.en: Compulsory CRS registration for in-scope sealed secondary cells or batteries listed under Scheme II. IS 16046 is not voluntary for covered products, and lithium registrations under IS 16046 (Part 2) require rated-capacity verification per IS 16047 (Part 3):2018.
target.zh: 对 Scheme II 所列范围内密封二次电芯或电池为强制 CRS 注册。IS 16046 对覆盖产品不是自愿要求，且 IS 16046 (Part 2) 下的锂电注册须按 IS 16047 (Part 3):2018 进行额定容量验证。
target.zht: 對 Scheme II 所列範圍內密封二次電芯或電池為強制 CRS 註冊。IS 16046 對涵蓋產品不是自願要求，且 IS 16046 (Part 2) 下的鋰電註冊須按 IS 16047 (Part 3):2018 進行額定容量驗證。

cn.en: China battery reports do not create Indian CRS registration.
cn.zh: 中国电池报告不会形成印度 CRS 注册。
cn.zht: 中國電池報告不會形成印度 CRS 註冊。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Not India-ready for cordless tools until the battery and cell scope is checked against CRS, required BIS registration is obtained, and lithium rated-capacity verification is documented where IS 16046 (Part 2) applies.

source.publisher: Bureau of Indian Standards / Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

rows.requirement: Chargers, Power Adaptors, and Electrical Accessories
rows.target_requirement: Power adaptors and similar electronic apparatus are listed in BIS Scheme II CRS under IS/IEC 62368-1:2023. The 2023 edition was notified in Oct 2025, with migration from Mar 2026, and replaces the legacy IS 13252 and IS 616 routes for covered AV/ICT-type equipment. A power-tool kit with an external charger, adaptor, or PSU should be split into tool body, battery or cell, and charger or adaptor compliance scopes; each component may trigger a different BIS route.
target_standards: IS/IEC 62368-1:2023 for listed power adaptors under CRS
IS 13252 and IS 616 legacy standards replaced for covered categories
Applicable QCO or CRS category for chargers, adaptors, or accessories
rows.china_equivalent: China tool files may include GB 3883 for the tool and separate charger reports. India still requires component-level BIS scope decisions and CRS registration where the adaptor, charger, or PSU is listed.
china_standards: China charger safety standards where applicable
rows.gap: The common gap is importing a kit under only the tool model number while omitting CRS treatment for the adaptor or charger, or relying on old IS 13252 / IS 616 evidence after the IS/IEC 62368-1:2023 transition. India customs and BIS documentation should match the actual components shipped and the current CRS standard.

target.en: Compulsory where the charger, adaptor, or PSU is listed under CRS or another notified BIS category. IS/IEC 62368-1:2023 is the current CRS standard for listed power adaptors, with migration from Mar 2026 from the replaced IS 13252 / IS 616 standards.
target.zh: 当充电器、适配器或电源列入 CRS 或其他已通知 BIS 类别时为强制要求。IS/IEC 62368-1:2023 是 CRS 所列电源适配器的现行标准，并自 2026 年 3 月起从已被取代的 IS 13252 / IS 616 标准迁移。
target.zht: 當充電器、適配器或電源列入 CRS 或其他已通知 BIS 類別時為強制要求。IS/IEC 62368-1:2023 是 CRS 所列電源適配器的現行標準，並自 2026 年 3 月起從已被取代的 IS 13252 / IS 616 標準遷移。

cn.en: China charger reports do not replace Indian CRS registration where required.
cn.zh: 中国充电器报告不能替代印度要求的 CRS 注册。
cn.zht: 中國充電器報告不能替代印度要求的 CRS 註冊。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Conditionally non-compliant until charger, adaptor, and PSU scope is separated from the tool body and any required CRS registration or migration to IS/IEC 62368-1:2023 is in place.

rows.target_requirement: BIS operates the Foreign Manufacturers Certification Scheme for foreign manufacturers to obtain a licence to use the Standard Mark on products conforming to Indian Standards, except electronics and IT goods notified by MeitY that follow CRS. China manufacturers and Indian importers should route in-scope products through FMCS, CRS, or the applicable BIS scheme before shipment.
target_standards: BIS CRS for notified Electronics and IT Goods
Applicable QCO, licence, Standard Mark, CoC, or registration requirement
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese factory certification, CCC where relevant, GB 3883 tool safety evidence, and export test reports do not grant permission to use the BIS Standard Mark or clear in-scope notified goods in India.
china_standards: China domestic certification or export test reports
rows.gap: The import gap is procedural as well as technical: the manufacturer or importer must align the BIS licence, registration, marking, model inclusion, factory identity, and shipped SKU before import. A test report alone is not the import route.

target.en: Mandatory for products covered by a BIS QCO or CRS notification before import or placement on the Indian market. The applicable BIS route depends on the notified product category.
target.zh: 对 BIS QCO 或 CRS 通知覆盖的产品，在进口或投放印度市场前为强制要求。适用 BIS 路径取决于已通知产品类别。
target.zht: 對 BIS QCO 或 CRS 通知覆蓋的產品，在進口或投放印度市場前為強制要求。適用 BIS 路徑取決於已通知產品類別。

cn.en: China domestic compliance does not substitute for Indian import certification.
cn.zh: 中国国内合规不能替代印度进口认证。
cn.zht: 中國國內合規不能替代印度進口認證。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Not import-ready until the applicable BIS route is completed and the licence, registration, mark use, and model coverage match the shipped goods.

rows.requirement: BIS Compulsory Certification and QCO Scope
rows.target_requirement: BIS certification is normally voluntary, but the Indian central government makes compliance compulsory for notified products through Quality Control Orders. For an in-scope power tool, electrical accessory, charger, battery, or cell, the applicable IS standard and BIS mark, licence, certificate, or CRS registration required by the notification are compulsory market-access conditions.
target_standards: BIS Act, 2016 and BIS conformity assessment schemes
Quality Control Orders for notified product categories
Applicable IS standard named in the QCO or CRS schedule [compulsory when notified]
rows.china_equivalent: China power-tool technical files commonly cite the GB 3883 series for hand-held motor-operated electric tools, transportable tools, and lawn and garden machinery. GB 3883 evidence may help engineering comparison but does not replace BIS certification, CRS registration, or QCO compliance for India.
rows.gap: The key gap is assuming that a China domestic safety report is enough for India. Importers must first classify the exact SKU against BIS compulsory certification, Scheme I, Scheme II CRS, Scheme X, and current QCO lists, then obtain the required BIS route before placing or importing in-scope goods.

target.en: Compulsory for notified products under QCOs or CRS schedules. BIS lists compulsory certification products and states that mandatory use of the Standard Mark, licence, or CoC is directed through QCOs.
target.zh: 对 QCO 或 CRS 清单中已通知的产品为强制要求。BIS 列示强制认证产品，并说明通过 QCO 指令强制使用标准标志、许可证或合格证书。
target.zht: 對 QCO 或 CRS 清單中已通知的產品為強制要求。BIS 列示強制認證產品，並說明透過 QCO 指令強制使用標準標誌、許可證或合格證書。

cn.en: China domestic baseline commonly uses GB 3883 series for in-scope power tools.
cn.zh: 中国境内基线通常对适用电动工具采用 GB 3883 系列。
cn.zht: 中國境內基線通常對適用電動工具採用 GB 3883 系列。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Not India-ready as-is if the file only contains GB 3883 evidence. BIS/QCO scope must be checked by SKU, and any notified product must complete the compulsory BIS route before import or sale.

rows.requirement: IS 302 and Relevant IS Safety Standards
rows.target_requirement: Where an electrical appliance, accessory, or tool-related product is listed in a BIS QCO, the named Indian Standard becomes compulsory for that in-scope product. IS 302 (Part 1):2024 has been mandatory for covered household and similar electrical appliances since 23 Feb 2025. However, the Omnibus Technical Regulation and Machinery QCO 2024 that had mandated Scheme X for industrial power tools, including IS 62841 items, was rescinded on 16 January 2026; therefore the general power-tool mandate is currently rescinded and SKU scope must be checked against still-active QCO or CRS entries.
target_standards: IS 302 (Part 1):2024 where named by a BIS QCO
Omnibus Technical Regulation / Machinery QCO 2024 rescinded 16 January 2026
Relevant IS standard named by the notified product category
Scheme I (ISI Mark Scheme) for applicable BIS product certification
rows.china_equivalent: GB 3883 series evidence for China can be used for clause mapping, but India certification depends on the Indian Standard and conformity assessment scheme named in the notification.
rows.gap: A frequent documentation gap is treating all power tools as still subject to the rescinded 2024 Scheme X machinery mandate. Covered IS 302 (Part 1):2024 appliance scopes remain mandatory where notified, but the broad industrial power-tool mandate under the Omnibus Technical Regulation / Machinery QCO 2024 is not currently active after the 16 January 2026 rescission.

target.en: Compulsory when the relevant IS, including IS 302 (Part 1):2024 for covered appliance scopes, is named by an active notified QCO. The general Scheme X industrial power-tool mandate from the Omnibus Technical Regulation / Machinery QCO 2024 is currently rescinded.
target.zh: 当相关 IS（包括覆盖电器范围的 IS 302 (Part 1):2024）被仍有效的已通知 QCO 指定时为强制要求。2024 年综合技术法规 / 机械 QCO 下的一般 Scheme X 工业电动工具强制令目前已撤销。
target.zht: 當相關 IS（包括涵蓋電器範圍的 IS 302 (Part 1):2024）被仍有效的已通知 QCO 指定時為強制要求。2024 年綜合技術法規 / 機械 QCO 下的一般 Scheme X 工業電動工具強制令目前已撤銷。

cn.en: GB 3883 supports China-market safety evidence but is not a BIS licence or CRS registration.
cn.zh: GB 3883 支持中国市场安全证据，但不是 BIS 许可证或 CRS 注册。
cn.zht: GB 3883 支援中國市場安全證據，但不是 BIS 許可證或 CRS 註冊。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Conditionally non-compliant until the India file identifies the exact active notified category and BIS route. Do not cite the rescinded 2024 Omnibus Technical Regulation / Machinery QCO as a current general power-tool mandate.

source.publisher: Bureau of Indian Standards / Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade
